title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take up to 10 days of paid sick leave per year for personal illness or medical appointments. If you are unable to work due to illness, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can report your absence via email or phone call. For absences longer than three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. Additionally, please complete the Sick Leave Request Form available on the HR portal within 48 hours of your return to work. If you have any questions or need assistance, contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234. Remember to check your individual employment contract for any specific provisions related to sick leave.
